<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code style
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested on OpenCart 2.3.x and/or 3.x
- [ ] No PHP errors/warnings (`php -l` passes)
- [ ] Follows the existing code style (Pint)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] `dist/*.ocmod.zip` rebuilt if module files changed
